summary: RSI-based oversold and overbought mean-reversion workflow with optional EMA confirmation, funding context, and staged exits.
core_logic: Use RSI extremes to identify oversold and overbought states.
Optionally require EMA cross confirmation for faster momentum continuation entries.
Use volume and funding context as filters rather than primary alpha.
Manage exits through rescans, graduated take-profit, and stop-loss controls.
recommended_next_step: Keep this case as a packaged reference now, and add named presets plus staged short-entry behavior later if needed.
